newsSince: No material AI-node news since June 9. Hexcel signed a long-term composite-materials partnership with Deutsche Aircraft for the D328eco turboprop (announced at ILA Berlin) and debuted at Eurosatory in Paris on June 11. Both are aerospace/defense items, not AI-infrastructure evidence.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict screen: the D328eco partnership and Eurosatory debut are aerospace/defense wins with no AI-node read-through. Robotics/compute-structure thesis remains theoretical. +5.2% move is aerospace-recovery flow, not new node evidence. Hold rank 95; no fundamental shift for this lens.
verdicts.bull: Carbon-fiber moat could feed robotics/lightweight compute structures; aerospace recovery + new D328eco program lengthen demand.
verdicts.neutral: Composites story is real but AI-node exposure is indirect; aerospace cycle, not AI, drives the print.
verdicts.bear: On a strict AI-node screen this is a commercial-aerospace play; rich aerospace re-rating leaves thin residual alpha.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Robotics/aero-compute composite adoption proving an AI-node link
verdicts.primaryRisk: Pure aerospace-cycle exposure with no genuine AI-node catalyst
